body_txt: Alice is a librarian . During the day, she wears long skirts, a loose blouse done all the way up to her neck, her hair in a bun and sensible shoes. Get Alice home to her significant other, however, and well — the blouse is going to be on the floor , the skirt in the hall, her hair all over the place ... and the rest is too NSFW even to describe. As strait-laced as Alice may be in public, none of that carries over into her private life — and vice versa. A Sub-Trope of Living a Double Life . Compare Seemingly Wholesome '50s Girl and Covert Pervert . Contrast Aggressive Submissive .
